author: Disney Channel YouTube
text:
When Jake Gets the A-List Treatment in Class 🙄📝 | Hannah Montana Throwback | @disneychannel
Watch a clip from Hannah Montana Season 1 Episode 14, "New Kid in School". Celebrity Jake Ryan starts at Miley's school and gets special treatment.

Watch the next Hannah Montana video here: https://youtu.be/P_6d0hFMDRc

Available on Disney+
https://shows.disney.com/hannah-montana

Watch more Hannah Montana videos here: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg6R6yXKSLYDY0yMFw36XjhK5mBZWlW9t&si=0L5gyjaGNkkCJeul

Miley Stewart (Miley Cyrus) is a teenager living a secret double life as an average schoolgirl by day and as the famous recording artist Hannah Montana by night!

author: Disney Channel YouTube
text:
Piano play time! 🎹 | Raven's Home | Disney Channel
Watch Raven's Home on Disney Channel! And check out more Raven's Home videos here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLiv1IUQDVSNLtOht0r6zO55LzFhws8XQU

Raven Baxter (Raven-Symoné) and her twins Booker (Issac Ryan Brown) and Nia (Navia Robinson) —along with Raven's longtime best friend Chelsea (Anneliese van der Pol) and son Levi (Jason Maybaum), and Nia's best friend and neighbor Tess (Sky Katz)—are focused on pursuing their creative dreams. Booker, Nia and Tess form a music group, The Chi-Lective, with Levi as their music video director. Meanwhile, Raven is determined to launch her fashion line while Chelsea has found her niche as a life coach!

Available on Disney+ 
https://ondisneyplus.disney.com/show/ravens-home
